_comment: Context Governor MCP Registry. Copy to registry.json and edit. Each top-level key is a backend; gov.* shortcut tools only appear if their expected backend name is registered. See README.md for the full schema and the gov.*-tool contract.

serena.description: Code intelligence — symbols, references, diagnostics. Powers gov.search_code.

context7.description: Library and framework documentation lookup. Powers gov.search_docs.

playwright.description: Browser automation and end-to-end testing. Powers gov.browser_task.

github.description: GitHub repository, issue, and pull request management. Reachable via gov.project_tool.

example-http-backend.description: Example HTTP backend with env-var-driven auth header. Use ${ENV_VAR} placeholders in headers — the governor interpolates them at connect time so secrets stay out of registry.json.
